item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: Today we are offering the sacrament of confession for students and staff. Grade 7/8 teachers - please come to the chapel at the scheduled time. Confessions will be available to high school students during period 3. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to see Mr. Vonesch. Thank you!

item.title: A message from: Mme. Laneville and Mrs. Lalonde:
item.description: Don't forget grade 12s that today is the last day to buy your Prom tickets on school cash online. Please speak to Mrs. Lalonde of Mme. Laneville if this will be a problem, for any reason. We can't wait to see you all there.

item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: Just a reminder that Mme Bourdon would like all ski/snowboard participants to return their arm band to her today. Please drop it off at Mme Bourdon's office.

item.title: A message from Student Council:
item.description: Popcorn is on sale today (and every spirit wear and dress down day for the rest of the year) in the atrium for $2! Support your student council!
